data.title: Investor home purchases rise 1% to 52,000 in Q3; Redfin reports market share remains steady amidst muted activity.
data.description: In Seattle, U.S. investor home purchases increased by 1% year over year during the third quarter, totaling around 52,000 properties. A recent report from Redfin, a real estate brokerage powered by Rocket, revealed this trend. Investor activity has remained steady due to similar factors causing overall stagnancy in the housing market. The current market conditions contrast sharply with those that led to the significant surge in investments during the pandemic. As a result, many potential buyers are finding themselves unable to enter the market due to high prices.

data.title: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei stands firm on the issue of Nvidia chip sales to China, expressing national security concerns despite recent partnership.
data.description: Dario Amodei, CEO of Anthropic, reaffirmed his stance on the potential sale of Nvidia Corp's chips to China, citing concerns for national security. During an interview at the New York Times Dealbook summit, Amodei emphasized the risks associated with providing China access to these chips, highlighting worries about the country's capability to surpass the U.S. in intelligence, defense, and economic sectors. Despite Anthropic's recent partnership with Nvidia, Amodei maintained his position, stating, "My view hasn't changed." He acknowledged his respect for Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang, clarifying that his concerns are based on policy rather than personal matters. Full coverage is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Asahi Kasei to cease hexamethylene diamine (HMD) production to boost long-term profitability and structural reform.
data.description: In Tokyo, Asahi Kasei has announced the discontinuation of hexamethylene diamine (HMD) production as the company continues to optimize its portfolio.

data.title: Soluna to offer $32 million in shares at $1.77 each under Nasdaq rules for green data centers.
data.description: Soluna Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: SLNH), a company specializing in green data centers for intensive computing applications, recently disclosed the finalization of agreements for the acquisition and sale of 18,079,144 shares of common stock (or pre-funded warrants instead) along with Series C warrants for buying up to 18,079,144 common stock shares. The purchase price stands at $1.77 per share (or pre-funded warrant in lieu thereo).

data.title: Optimum Communications, Inc. (NYSE: OPTU) to present at UBS Global Media and Comms Conf on Dec 9, 2025 at 12:45 PM ET.
data.description: Optimum Communications, Inc. stated that Dennis Mathew, Chairman and CEO, is scheduled to speak at the UBS Global Media and Communications Conference on December 9, 2025, at 12:45 PM Eastern Time. The presentation will be broadcast live on the Optimum Investor Relations website. Optimum Communications, Inc. is listed as NYSE: OPTU.

data.title: Håkan Agnevall will join Aptiv's Board of Directors, enhancing its expertise.
data.description: A company based in Schaffhausen, Switzerland has recently announced through a press release that Håkan Agnevall will be joining their board of directors. Aptiv, the company in question, made the statement via Business Wire. This development signifies an addition to the leadership team of Aptiv.

data.title: Hackett Group, Inc. held a Dutch auction tender offer to buy up to $40 million of its common stock, which expired on December 4, 2025.
data.description: Miami-based Hackett Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: HCKT), specializing in generative artificial intelligence consulting, released initial findings from its modified "Dutch auction" tender offer. The offer aimed to buy back a maximum of $40 million in value of its common stock, each share valued at $0.001. The offer officially closed at midnight on December 4, 2025, in New York City.

data.title: Otovo USA merges with Otovo ASA to create global home energy service provider; now operates in Europe and US.
data.description: In Houston, Otovo USA, a prominent provider of energy services for homes and businesses, has finalized a merger with Otovo ASA of Europe, a top player in residential power. This union has resulted in the establishment of a global company, Otovo, equipped with an AI-powered service platform. Otovo now operates across Europe and sections of the U.S. offering combined energy services for homes and businesses, including retail power, repair services, and grid trading. This merger aims to capitalize on the vast market potential and technological advancements in the sector.

data.title: Canadian AI company Tracktile receives $1.25M in Seed funding to aid SMB F&B manufacturers with AI software for operational excellence.
data.description: A software company based in Charlottetown, Prince Edward Island, Tracktile, has recently secured a Seed investment of $1.25 million. The company focuses on AI technology and aims to transform the way F&B manufacturing teams engage with software. Through its innovative "AI Operating System," Tracktile serves as a collaborative tool that automates data collection and offers predictive, real-time insights to enhance human decision-making. This approach sets a higher benchmark for operational efficiency and team productivity. Overall, Tracktile's goal is to empower F&B manufacturing teams through cutting-edge technological solutions.

Dreamland Limited finalizes $18M equity purchase deal.

data.title: ParaZero signs distribution deal with top Western European distributor to access NATO markets for defense solutions._STRONGREACH.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, in Kfar Saba, Israel, ParaZero Technologies Ltd. (Nasdaq: PRZO), a company focusing on aerospace defense, revealed a new partnership. This partnership entails a distribution agreement with a prominent Distributor from Western Europe. The Distributor is known for its expertise in advanced defense systems and force training solutions. ParaZero is recognized for its innovative autonomous solutions for both manned and unmanned aerial systems within the global industry. The collaboration aims to enhance the reach and availability of ParaZero's cutting-edge technologies across Western Europe.

data.title: Abaxx to introduce Enwex UK Onshore Wind Futures on Dec 12, 2025, expanding suite of weather-indexed benchmarks in global power markets.
data.description: The introduction of this new benchmark is part of a developing range of weather-indexed benchmarks, aimed at aiding hedging and risk management in power markets worldwide.

data.title: Saudi Arabia launches "Saudi Properties" platform ahead of Non-Saudi Property Ownership Law to manage real estate ownership.
data.description: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, on December 5, 2025, the Real Estate General Authority (REGA) unveiled the introduction of a national platform called "Saudi Properties." This platform will be the designated official hub for all real estate ownership matters in the country.

data.title: Mural Oncology's acquisition by XRA 5 Corp. under Chapter 1 of Companies Act 2014 becomes effective on 5 December 2025.
data.description: Mural Oncology, based in Waltham, Mass. and Dublin, has been acquired by XRA 5 Corp., a subsidiary of XOMA Royalty Corporation, as officially announced on Dec. 5, 2025. The acquisition was made through a scheme of arrangement under Chapter 1 of Part 9 of the Companies Act 2014. This agreement involves XRA 5 Corp. acquiring all the shares of Mural. The acquisition officially came into effect on the stated date, marking a significant development in the business world. Mural Oncology is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol MURA, while XOMA Royalty is listed under Nasdaq as XOMA.

data.title: SL Green closes $1.3 billion Opportunistic Debt Fund, with additional investment capacity through sidecar structures and separate accounts.
data.description: SL Green Realty Corp, the largest office landlord in Manhattan, revealed the completion of its SLG Opportunistic Debt Fund. The Fund secured over $1.3 billion in total capital commitments. The company also mentioned the availability of extra investment opportunities through sidecar structures and discretionary separate accounts.

data.title: Solana WET presale compromised by Sybil wallets as HumidiFi delays launch. CEO warns of increasing Sybil attacks, urges KYC or detection tech.
data.description: CEO Nick Vaiman of Bubblemaps highlighted the increasing occurrences of Sybil attacks within presales and airdrops. He emphasized the importance for teams to implement KYC processes or algorithmic detection methods to combat this issue effectively.

data.title: Ethereum options traders are more bullish than Bitcoin ones, with data revealing higher optimism amid recent upgrades.
data.description: Following recent network upgrades and improving macro uncertainty, data on options trading indicates that traders are exhibiting less bearish sentiment towards Ethereum compared to Bitcoin. This suggests a shift in market perception towards Ethereum, with a more positive outlook on its performance. These observations are reflected in the numbers, with a decreasing number of bearish positions taken by traders in the Ethereum market compared to the Bitcoin market.

data.title: Bitcoin continues above $90,000. $289.05 million liquidated in 24 hours. Bitcoin ETFs saw $194.6 million outflows, Ethereum ETFs $41.6 million. Support at $84,400 critical amid market weakness.
data.description: Bitcoin maintains its position above $90,000 amidst ongoing market weakness, with $289.05 million in liquidations recorded in the past 24 hours. Bitcoin ETFs experienced net outflows of $194.6 million on Thursday, while Ethereum ETFs saw net outflows of $41.6 million. Notably, around 300,648 BTC were accumulated at $84,400, establishing a significant support level, according to crypto chart analyst Ali Martinez. Analyst Michael van de Poppe noted Bitcoin's stagnant performance within a specific price range, lacking clear directional momentum. Any potential breakdown from this range could result in...
